def: A building where people live; a home.
Recently made, bought, or begun; not old or used before.
Having existed for a long time; also used for a person's age.
On the present day — the day that is happening now.
A male child or a young man.
A group of people related by blood, marriage, or living together as relatives.
The main meal eaten in the middle of the day.
A solid food made from milk, often eaten on bread.
A round, starchy vegetable that grows underground and is eaten cooked.
A warm liquid dish made by cooking vegetables, meat, or beans in water or broth.
A large self-service shop that sells food and everyday household goods.
